name: Cottage Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cucumber, green onion, and radishes together.
2. Blend in the cottage cheese and sour cream.
3. Add the celery salt and pepper, blending all of the ingredients well.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip
Suggested Dippers: Pita Bread Triangles, Potato Skins, Seafood, Turnips, Bok Choy
